holdings.infoBox: GAMR is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 22.31%, NVIDIA at 9.93%, Microsoft at 8.45%, Meta Platforms at 8.02%, and Tencent Holdings at 7.34%.

overview.description: The Amplify Video Game Leaders ETF (GAMR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the VettaFi Video Game Leaders index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of the 20 largest companies from the global video gaming industry, specifically those involved in the video game value chain. GAMR was launched on Mar 8, 2016 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
